services.name: Full Wedding Planning
services.description: Comprehensive wedding planning from concept to execution. We handle every detail so you can enjoy your special day.
services.shortDescription: End-to-end luxury wedding planning in Dubai.
services.seoDescription: Luxury wedding planning services in Dubai. From venue selection to on-day coordination, we handle every detail for your perfect day.

faqs.question: What is included in full wedding planning?
faqs.answer: Our full wedding planning includes venue selection, vendor management, budget planning, design concept, and on-day coordination.

faqs.question: How far in advance should I book?
faqs.answer: We recommend booking at least 6-12 months in advance for luxury weddings in Dubai to secure the best venues and vendors.

services.name: Wedding Stage & Themed Decorations
services.description: Exquisite stage designs and themed decorations that reflect your personal style and luxury.
services.shortDescription: Custom luxury stage and theme decorations.
services.seoDescription: Exquisite wedding stage and themed decorations in Dubai. Custom backdrops, floral arrangements, and luxury designs.

faqs.question: Can I customize the stage design?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our stage designs are fully customizable to match your theme, colors, and venue requirements.

faqs.question: Do you provide floral arrangements for the stage?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer both fresh and high-quality artificial floral arrangements as part of our stage decoration services.
